INVOKE.COMMENT: challengeCode exist, get challenge social rule data

INVOKE.NAME: %results/status%=='200'
INVOKE.COMMENT: api call is success but no challenge exists, throw exception

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: There is no challenge with challenge id: %challengeId%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: unable to retrieve challenge data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: api call is success and social interaction exists

INVOKE.NAME: %results/status%=='200'
INVOKE.COMMENT: api call is success but no social interaction exists, throw exception

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: There is no social interaction with social inetraction id: %socialInteractionId%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to get social interactions data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.NAME: INFLUENCER
MAP.COMMENT: socialType is INFLUENCER, continue with rest of the logic

EXIT.NAME: $default
EXIT.COMMENT: socialType is GROUP, don't get the friend details in this service

INVOKE.COMMENT: get active friends list from social link API- entity1
get active friends list from social link API- entity2

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: friends exist, continue with rest of the logic

INVOKE.NAME: %resultsSize1%=0 && %resultsSize2%=0
INVOKE.COMMENT: throw no more friends found exception

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: friends exist, continue with rest of the logic
